title: elaphoglossum mainahasae
intro: Elaphoglossum mainahasae is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum mainahasae include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum mainahasae are typically made by drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or decoction.
